data: {"generalSituation":"A fresh to strong easterly airstream will continue to affect the coast of Guangdong today. Meanwhile, a band of clouds will cover the region. The easterly airstream is expected to moderate early next week. The weather will improve over Guangdong. It will be generally fine over the region and hot during the day in the middle and latter parts of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260321","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, occasionally force 6 offshore and on high ground at first.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
